metadata.summary: The Secure Key REST API Schema Definitions.

documentation:
## SecureKey REST API Schema Definitions ##
Schemas and Pydantic Models for the SecureKey VPN REST API.

SecureKey VPN is available on the Azure Marketplace.

Github: https://github.com/JETtech-Labs/sk_schemas

website: https://www.jettechlabs.com/

modules.name: sk_schemas.stats
documentation: !/usr/bin/python3

modules.name: sk_schemas.sys
documentation: !/usr/bin/python3

modules.name: sk_schemas.inet
documentation: !/usr/bin/python3

classes.name: sk_schemas.inet.TcpUdpPortModel
documentation: from pydantic_extra_types.mac_address import MacAddress  # type: ignore

classes.name: sk_schemas.inet.MacAddress

methods.name: sk_schemas.inet.MacAddress.__get_pydantic_core_schema__
documentation:
Return a Pydantic CoreSchema with the MAC address validation.

Args:
    source: The source type to be converted.
    handler: The handler to get the CoreSchema.

Returns:
    A Pydantic CoreSchema with the MAC address validation.

methods.name: sk_schemas.inet.MacAddress._validate
documentation:
Validate a MAC Address from the provided str value.

Args:
    __input_value: The str value to be validated.
    _: The source type to be converted.

Returns:
    str: The parsed MAC address.

methods.name: sk_schemas.inet.MacAddress.validate_mac_address
documentation: Validate a MAC Address from the provided byte value.

Represents a MAC address and provides methods for conversion, validation, and serialization.

```py

class Network(BaseModel):
    mac_address: MacAddress

network = Network(mac_address="00:00:5e:00:53:01")
print(network)
#> mac_address='00:00:5e:00:53:01'
```

classes.name: sk_schemas.acl.MacIpAclRule

methods.name: sk_schemas.acl.MacIpAclRule.to_string
documentation: convert the rule to a string
MACIP ACL Rules are ingress only ACL which permit/deny traffic based MAC and IP address matches
vl_api_macip_acl_rule_t struct from VPP

classes.name: sk_schemas.acl.IpAclRule

methods.name: sk_schemas.acl.IpAclRule.from_vapi
documentation: create new instance from raw data

methods.name: sk_schemas.acl.IpAclRule.to_string
documentation: convert the rule to a string
ACL IP Rules permit traffic based on a number of Layer3/Layer4 fields
vl_api_acl_rule_t struct from VPP
